name: Fortis Healthcare Limited
summary: Fortis Healthcare Limited, an integrated healthcare delivery service provider, offers secondary, tertiary, and quaternary care in India, the United Arab Emirates, Sri Lanka, and internationally. Its healthcare verticals comprise hospitals, diagnostics, and day care specialty facilities. The company offers services in the areas of cardiac care, orthopedics, neurosciences, oncology, renal care, metabolic diseases, and mother and child care. As of February 5, 2021, it operated a network of 36 healthcare facilities with approximately 4,000 operational beds. The company also operates approximately 400 diagnostics centers and laboratories; and 1,400 collection centers. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Gurugram, India.
